grants.name: Federal Volunteer Grants 2025–26
grants.notes: ⚠️ 10 DAYS LEFT. EOIs through local Federal MP — contact electorate office ASAP. $66,665 per electorate. Must have 40%+ volunteer workforce. Two-stage: EOI to MP first, then invited to full application May 2026. Both orgs are volunteer-driven — strong fit.

grants.name: Local Sporting Champions (Round 4)
grants.notes: For individual coaches, officials and competitors aged 12–18 attending championships. +$200 for international/2000km+ travel. Could support SuperNova U18 players.

grants.name: Whitehorse Community Grants 2026
grants.notes: Eastern suburbs. Mitcham Badminton is in Whitehorse — clean venue fit for SuperNova Learn & Play eastern sessions. Also Partnership Grants up to $40K/yr for 4 years. Must benefit Whitehorse community. Contact grants@whitehorse.vic.gov.au.

grants.name: City of Melbourne Connected Neighbourhoods
grants.notes: Monthly assessment rounds. Only relevant if TVS delivers programs within City of Melbourne boundaries.

grants.name: City of Melbourne — Town Halls Scheme (CUTHS)
categories: Free venue use for NFP events
grants.notes: In-kind support for NFP organisations to use Melbourne Town Halls at no cost. Only relevant if TVS holds events within City of Melbourne.

grants.name: Wyndham Medium Grants – Round 2
grants.notes: Strongest council opportunity — both orgs are Wyndham-based. Requires 2:1 co-contribution (volunteer hours at $45/hr count). New grants policy adopted 24 March 2026 — officer-assessed, priority groups include women, CALD communities.

grants.name: Wyndham Small Grants
grants.notes: Rolling applications. Quick wins for equipment or small program costs. Both orgs are Wyndham-based — easy eligibility.

closedGrants.name: Victorian Sporting Club Grants (Round 2)
closedGrants.reason: Closed 7 April 2026. SuperNova was restricted to Category 4 only ($750 travel). All categories reopen in 2026-27 Round 1 (~Oct 2026).

closedGrants.name: Maroondah Annual Community Grants 2026/27
closedGrants.reason: Closed 2 April 2026. Up to $10K. Outcomes mid-July 2026. Next round ~Feb 2027. Enquiry sent to Josh Burt re: outside-council venue eligibility.

closedGrants.name: Hobsons Bay Make it Happen Grants
closedGrants.reason: Closed 30 March 2026. Up to $25K. Next round ~Feb 2027.

closedGrants.name: Melton Community Grants 2025/26
closedGrants.reason: Closed 31 March 2026. Up to $5K. Watch for 2026/27 program.

closedGrants.name: ASF Active Kids Grant 2026
closedGrants.reason: Closed 27 March 2026. Watch for next round ~March 2027.

closedGrants.name: Knox Leisure Minor Capital Works Grant
closedGrants.reason: Closed 15 March 2026. Up to $10K. Opens 1 Feb each year.

closedGrants.name: Knox Community Development Fund 2025-26
closedGrants.reason: Closed late 2025. Watch for 2026-27 round mid-2026 — strong fit for ACM Bayswater.

closedGrants.name: City of Melbourne Community Inclusion Grants 2026-27
City of Melbourne Community Events Grants 2026-27
Change Our Game Community Activation Grants 2024-25
closedGrants.reason: Closed. Up to $10K for women in sport. Watch for 2025-26 round — excellent for Learn & Play Women Only.

closedGrants.name: Multicultural Festivals & Events Program 2024-25
closedGrants.reason: Rounds 1 & 2 closed. Up to $50K. Watch for 2025-26 program — ideal for TVS Holi/Diwali.

closedGrants.name: Sport & Rec Vic Significant Sporting Events Program

upcomingGrants.name: City of Melbourne Annual Arts Grants 2027
upcomingGrants.note: Arts projects in City of Melbourne. Also residencies up to $5K.

upcomingGrants.name: Knox Community Development Fund 2026-27
upcomingGrants.note: Eastern suburbs — ACM Bayswater is in Knox. Sport/leisure, multicultural, community strengthening. Strong fit for SuperNova Learn & Play eastern expansion. Contact Community Partnerships 9298 8000.

upcomingGrants.name: Change Our Game Community Activation Grants 2025-26
upcomingGrants.note: Perfect for SuperNova Women's Learn & Play program. 3 streams: Participation, Education, Community Leaders.

upcomingGrants.name: Multicultural Festivals & Events Program 2025-26
upcomingGrants.note: Strong fit for TVS multicultural events. Contact multicultural-festivals.events@dpc.vic.gov.au.

upcomingGrants.name: VicHealth Active Club Grants (next round)
upcomingGrants.note: Women/girls participation, social/modified sport. Strong fit for Learn & Play.

upcomingGrants.name: Wyndham Active Revitalisation Program
upcomingGrants.note: $3.75M program for Wyndham sport infrastructure. Requires lease/licence at Council facility. Check eligibility with Council.

upcomingGrants.name: Wyndham Large Grants 2026-27
upcomingGrants.note: Incorporated NFPs in Wyndham. New grants policy adopted 24 March 2026.

upcomingGrants.name: Sporting Club Grants Program 2026-27 (Round 1)
upcomingGrants.note: All 5 categories available again for SuperNova (was restricted to Cat 4 only in 2025-26). Start planning now.
